magnesium_low_assessment_error: Mis‑evaluated magnesium level as normal and omitted needed replacement.
patient_search_incorrect: Incorrectly concluded patient does not exist or retrieved wrong patient.
age_calculation_incorrect: Computed patient age incorrectly from birthdate.
unnecessary_hba1c_order: Placed a new HbA1c test order when existing result was sufficient.
unnecessary_potassium_test_order: Ordered a follow‑up potassium test despite no clinical need.
hba1c_value_extraction_failed: Did not extract the HbA1c value, returned placeholder.
magnesium_quantity_unit_missing: Returned magnesium value without required unit or with wrong unit.
incorrect_potassium_dosage: Ordered potassium replacement with wrong dosage amount.
magnesium_observation_missing_false_nega: Incorrectly reported no recent magnesium observation when one existed.
potassium_low_assessment_error: Misinterpreted potassium level as not low and omitted required replacement order.
missing_hba1c_order: Failed to order a new HbA1c test when the existing result was outdated.
answer_not_generated: Did not produce a final answer after performing actions.
magnesium_value_extraction_failed: Failed to extract magnesium observation value, returned placeholder.
order_pairing_missing: Did not generate or return a ServiceRequest order when the instruction required pairing the result with an order.
unnecessary_potassium_order: Placed a potassium replacement order despite the potassium level being above the threshold (order created when not needed).
patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: patient id not resolved before query
